CREATE TABLE rand_exponential_test (id UInt32, value Float64);
INSERT INTO rand_exponential_test SELECT number, randExponential(0.1) FROM numbers(10);
SELECT id, value FROM rand_exponential_test WHERE value > 0;
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, lambda_value Float64);
SELECT jt.id, rt.value FROM join_test jt JOIN (SELECT randExponential(lambda_value) AS value, number FROM numbers(5) CROSS JOIN join_test) rt ON jt.id = rt.number;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT randExponential(0.01) AS exp_value FROM numbers(10000) WHERE exp_value < 2);
SELECT SUM(randExponential(0.2)) AS total_exp WHERE total_exp > 5 FROM numbers(50);
CREATE TABLE complex_rand (x Float64, y Float64);
INSERT INTO complex_rand SELECT randExponential(0.3) AS x, randExponential(0.7) AS y FROM numbers(100);
SELECT AVG(x) AS average_x, MAX(y) AS max_y FROM complex_rand;
SELECT number, randExponential(1) AS exp_value FROM numbers(10) HAVING exp_value < 0.5;
WITH (SELECT AVG(randExponential(0.5)) FROM numbers(50)) AS avg_exp SELECT avg_exp * 2 AS doubled_avg;
